info.title: Proposal Management API
info.description: REST API for client and proposal management (TsCorp challenge).

document.description: CPF (11 digits) or alphanumeric CNPJ (RFB IN 2.229/2024)

post.description: Approve a SUBMITTED proposal with optimistic lock (RF-06).

422.description: Validation, business rule, or transition error

post.description: Cancel a DRAFT or SUBMITTED proposal with optimistic lock (RF-08).

422.description: Validation, business rule, or transition error

get.description: Search proposals with filters, sorting, and pagination (RF-11, RF-12).

post.description: Create a new proposal in DRAFT status (RF-03). Requires Idempotency-Key header.

delete.description: Soft delete a proposal in DRAFT or SUBMITTED status with optimistic lock (RF-09).

patch.description: Update proposal fields in DRAFT status with optimistic lock (RF-04).

get.description: List audit trail entries for a proposal (RF-10).

post.description: Reject a SUBMITTED proposal with optimistic lock (RF-07).

422.description: Validation, business rule, or transition error

post.description: Submit a proposal from DRAFT to SUBMITTED with optimistic lock and idempotency (RF-05).

422.description: Validation, business rule, or transition error

message.example: Idempotency key reused with a different request payload.
